steps.title: Identify the defining signal
steps.content: The key phrase is “audience unfamiliar with the Haudenosaunee Confederacy.” This determines what the explanation must accomplish.

steps.title: Find the choice that best serves this audience
steps.content: C directly provides what an unfamiliar audience needs: it states the influence theory's claim (the Great Law influenced the US Constitution) and provides the contextual definition (centuries-old agreement binding six Native nations in the northeastern US). A and D fail to explain the theory at all, and B assumes it's already understood. That matches choice C — C is correct.
